2.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
2.content: World Order è una voce legacy del dossier London1666: early-19th-century social rank, reputation and propriety govern daily life. Nel dominio /London1666 usarla solo come overlay culturale esplicito, non come sostituzione del contesto 1666 storico-mercantile.
2.keysRaw: overlay, World Order, social overlay, early 19th century overlay, polite society overlay, world order Colonial1666
2.keysecondaryRaw: rank, reputation, propriety, social order, period drama overlay
2.keywordsRaw: overlay, World Order, social overlay, early 19th century overlay, polite society overlay, world order Colonial1666

3.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
3.content: Social Propriety as Law è una regola sociale legacy: every gesture, phrase, invitation and silence can protect or ruin reputation. In /London1666 usarla come filtro di eleganza e pressione pubblica solo quando la scena richiede un overlay di polite society.
3.keysRaw: propriety overlay, etiquette as law, polite society, social rules, reputation pressure, etiquette Colonial1666
3.keysecondaryRaw: gesture, phrase, invitation, silence, public approval
3.keywordsRaw: propriety overlay, etiquette as law, polite society, social rules, reputation pressure, etiquette Colonial1666

4.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
4.content: Aristocratic Elegance è un codice estetico legacy: refined speech, controlled emotion, luxury interiors, formal dress and status-conscious presentation. In /London1666 si traduce in superficie controllata, lusso sobrio e tensione pubblica, senza sostituire il tono mercantile-pirata.
4.keysRaw: aristocratic elegance, elegance, refined speech, controlled emotion, luxury interiors, formal dress
4.keysecondaryRaw: status-conscious presentation, polished surface tension, elite aesthetic
4.keywordsRaw: aristocratic elegance, elegance, refined speech, controlled emotion, luxury interiors, formal dress

5.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
5.content: 1666 -Mercantile Atmosphere è il tono operativo di Londra e delle rotte coloniali: governors, charters, letters of marque, privateers, merchant fleets, dark-wood cabins, sealed documents, port politics, contraband and sea danger. Mantenere il setting storico, non.
5.keysRaw: 1666, -Mercantile Atmosphere, London1666, merchant fleets, privateers, letters of marque, port politics
5.keysecondaryRaw: governors, charters, dark-wood cabins, sealed documents, contraband, sea danger
5.keywordsRaw: 1666, -Mercantile Atmosphere, London1666, merchant fleets, privateers, letters of marque, port politics

6.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
6.content: Drawing Rooms sono arene sociali opulente per visite, gossip, corteggiamento, negoziazione e gestione della reputazione. Nel contesto /London1666 funzionano come saloni mercantili e diplomatici dove conversazione, silenzi e introduzioni hanno valore politico.
6.keysRaw: drawing room, drawing rooms, social calls, salon, reception room, chandelier
6.keysecondaryRaw: gossip, courtship, negotiation, reputation management, merchant salon
6.keywordsRaw: drawing room, drawing rooms, social calls, salon, reception room, chandelier

7.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
7.content: Ballrooms sono spazi di performance pubblica, danza, musica, visibilità e giudizio sociale. Usarli come arene di reputazione dove scelta del partner, apparizione e presenza pubblica generano conseguenze.
7.keysRaw: ballroom, ballrooms, dance, formal dance, gala, assembly room
7.keysecondaryRaw: public performance, social judgment, partner choice, reputation arena
7.keywordsRaw: ballroom, ballrooms, dance, formal dance, gala, assembly room

8.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
8.content: Georgian Townhouses definiscono residenze urbane alla moda: facciate simmetriche, interni raffinati e spazi domestici di status. Usarle per visite private, trattative familiari, chiamate sociali e politica domestica controllata.
8.keysRaw: georgian townhouse, townhouse, townhouses, mansion, fashionable residence
8.keysecondaryRaw: symmetrical facades, refined interiors, status-signaling domestic spaces, private family scenes
8.keywordsRaw: georgian townhouse, townhouse, townhouses, mansion, fashionable residence

9.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
9.content: Country Estates sono proprietà aristocratiche con giardini formali, grounds curati e divide upstairs/downstairs. Nel contesto Douglas/London1666 collegano eredità, pressione familiare, stagionalità e contrasto di classe.
9.keysRaw: country estate, estate, estates, manor, country house, manor house, garden
9.keysecondaryRaw: manicured gardens, formal grounds, upstairs downstairs, inheritance pressure, class contrast
9.keywordsRaw: country estate, estate, estates, manor, country house, manor house, garden

10.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
10.content: Carriage travel è elegante e status-marked: footmen in livrea, clatter of hooves su cobblestone streets, arrivi e partenze visibili. Usare carrozze e strade acciottolate per conversazioni private, display sociale e transizioni con rischio pubblico.
10.keysRaw: carriage, carriages, horse-drawn carriage, cobblestones, cobblestone streets, travel
10.keysecondaryRaw: footmen in livery, clatter of hooves, arrivals, departures, private conversations, public visibility
10.keywordsRaw: carriage, carriages, horse-drawn carriage, cobblestones, cobblestone streets, travel

11.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
11.content: Colonial Ports and Warehouses sono la spina operativa dell'impero Douglas: docks, customs houses, bonded warehouses, counting rooms, loading yards e guarded quays. Usarli per cargo disputes, bribes, seizures, rumors of piracy and rival merchant pressure.

11.keysecondaryRaw: Douglas trade empire, cargo disputes, bribes, seizures, guarded quays, counting rooms

12.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry

12.keysecondaryRaw: golden pools of visibility, deep shadow, controlled exposure, evening scenes

13.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
13.content: Servants and Footmen sono presenza costante negli spazi élite: aprono porte, attendono carriages, stanno in attenzione e rafforzano class boundaries. Trattarli come marcatori visibili di wealth and social order, non come semplici comparse moderne.

13.keysecondaryRaw: class boundaries, wealth markers, social order, elite spaces

14.keysecondaryRaw: seating, introductions, public approval, charm, silence, implication

18.keysecondaryRaw: price wars, port access, political favors, sabotage, smuggling accusations, piracy accusations

19.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
19.content: [HISTORICAL] LOR: Douglas Commercial Lineage è la linea storica della Merchant House Douglas, fondata in England nel 1666 da Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas. Later expansion into Douglas Colonial Trading Company in the 1700s anchors Douglas California presence through colonial trade, governance and inherited commercial authority. Magnus Douglas belongs to the timeline only and is not the founder of the original enterprise.
19.keysRaw: Douglas Commercial Lineage, Merchant House Douglas founded 1666, Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas, Douglas colonial trading lineage, Douglas history
19.keysecondaryRaw: Magnus not founder, colonial trade, governance, inherited commercial authority
19.keywordsRaw: Douglas Commercial Lineage, Merchant House Douglas founded 1666, Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas, Douglas colonial trading lineage, Douglas history

20.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
20.content: [HISTORICAL] Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas è il founder storico di Merchant House Douglas nel 1666. Treat him as colonial governor, merchant lord and fleet-backed power broker: public fortune from trade, charters, warehouses and imperial contracts; private rumors of privateering, piracy or opportunistic maritime seizure.
20.keysRaw: Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas, Cornelius Douglas, Lord Cornelius, Douglas founder, colonial governor, merchant lord
20.keysecondaryRaw: fleet-backed power broker, public fortune, privateering rumors, piracy rumors, maritime seizure
20.keywordsRaw: Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas, Cornelius Douglas, Lord Cornelius, Douglas founder, colonial governor, merchant lord

21.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
21.content: [HISTORICAL] Merchant House Douglas è il volto rispettabile della lineage commerciale Douglas: founded in England in 1666 by Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas. Coordinates credit, cargo, contracts, political favors and colonial logistics while maintaining a mask of aristocratic legality.

21.keysecondaryRaw: credit, cargo, contracts, political favors, colonial logistics, aristocratic legality

22.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry

Operates through ports, warehouses, fleets, contracts, local officials and armed security, blending commerce with political influence.

22.keysecondaryRaw: ports, warehouses, fleets, contracts, local officials, armed security

60.name: TwinXFamily Bot Scenario - Colonial
60.content: Lo scenario 'TwinXFamily' per il mondo Colonial prevede: 1666. The grand drawing room of the Governor's Estate. Tomorrow is the beginning of the Colonial Season, where Alyssa will be presented to high society. L'Initial Message inizia con le direttive di Lord Governor Erik e coinvolge l'intero cast principale (Malachia, Noah, Wulfnic, Logan, Jasper/Jorund). La pressione è estrema.
60.keysRaw: TwinXFamily, scenario, Lord Governor Erik, Captain Lord Malachia
60.keywordsRaw: TwinXFamily, scenario, Lord Governor Erik, Captain Lord Malachia
